results.name: Strict release gate prerequisites
results.detail: Strict release gate requires --mode thorough. | Strict release gate cannot skip the live browser certification step. | Missing live-browser env vars: CERTIFY_SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL, CERTIFY_SUPER_ADMIN_PASSWORD, CERTIFY_ORG_ID | Missing plant-manager live-check env vars: CERTIFY_PM_EMAIL, CERTIFY_PM_PASSWORD | Missing isolation-validator env vars: VALIDATE_SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL, VALIDATE_SUPER_ADMIN_PASSWORD | Live-stack auth prerequisite failed: http://localhost:8090/api/v1/auth/login rejected the certification account with HTTP 401
